name: GridColumnResizeApi
description: The Resize API interface that is available in the grid `apiRef`.

properties.name: autosizeColumns
properties.description: Auto-size the columns of the grid based on the cells' content and the space available.
properties.type: (options?: undefined | { columns?: string[] | undefined, includeHeaders?: false | true | undefined, includeHeaderFilters?: false | true | undefined, includeOutliers?: false | true | undefined, outliersFactor?: number | undefined, expand?: false | true | undefined, disableColumnVirtualization?: false | true | undefined }) => Promise<void>
